raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A new bill will mandate no new additions to state or local building standards, unless required to address health and safety risks or to add fire-resistant technology.",
    "This new law will require state agencies involved in permitting to follow specific approval timelines, which will speed up building.",
    "Changing the law in the coastal zone will allow homeowners to build accessory dwelling units (ADUs) without the need for a coastal development permit.",
    "Encouraging ADUs after the Tubbs Fire in Sonoma County increased the housing supply in the region.",
    "A new law will lift the 30-day limit on tenancy rights for short-term rental landlords in L.A. County.",
    "A temporary eviction exemption will be created to allow those displaced by wildfires to remain in their temporary homes."
  ]
}
```
